name: antigravity-mcp
description: MCP server exposing the Google Antigravity (Gemini 3 Pro) coding AGENT — with real Read/Write/Bash tools — to Claude Code as a headless second agent. Spawns the actual `agy` CLI agent (file-in / file-out) through the local RU-unlock proxy, using the Antigravity OAuth token from Windows Credential Manager, with automatic account rotation on quota. By default the agent sees the project Claude runs in (process.cwd() -> --add-dir), so it can read/run the repo itself like Codex. The raw streamGenerateContent path is kept for the ping health-check.
